selection_brief: Select a current official photograph of a Thread-capable eero in a warm residential setting. The exact router must remain recognizable in both the 16:10 article hero and centered 16:9 library-card crop. Prefer natural wood, a restrained dark-green plant accent, practical placement, and an uncluttered homeowner scene. Reject images containing headline text, floating interface cards, diagrams, routing lines, signal waves, translucent panels, inset frames, progress bars, fake charts, or invented hardware.
crop_note: The official 10905x6261 eero 7 kitchen press photograph was cropped around the exact router and residential plant scene, then resized to 1600x1000. No generative or deterministic fallback artwork was used in the final cover.
